# Vendored third-party assets

## lightweight-charts.standalone.js

- **Library:** TradingView Lightweight Charts™
- **Version:** 4.2.3
- **License:** Apache License 2.0 (https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)
- **Source:** https://unpkg.com/lightweight-charts@4.2.3/dist/lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js
- **Copyright:** © 2025 TradingView, Inc.

Self-hosted (not loaded from a CDN) so the dashboard's strict
`Content-Security-Policy: script-src 'self'` is satisfied. The full license text
and copyright notice are retained in the file header. Pin the version above when
updating; re-fetch from the same `unpkg` path and refresh this note.
